name: tc_recall_01
query: 召回 chunk 数低于阈值
raw_text: 本文件描述了工程项目的施工流程和质量管理方法。
note: Recall-insufficient case: only 2 chunks recalled (MIN_RECALL_CHUNKS=5). Verifies Gate 1 (recall) returns 404 insufficient_recall. e2e golden set runs on a single chunk; cannot exercise recall-count thresholds. Awaiting integration test for TC-RECALL-01.
